description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and package, using the rust:buster Docker image for three build jobs and debian:buster for the packaging job. Define variables GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, PSXACT_CLI_OUTPUT=./psxact-cli/target/release/psxact-cli, and PSXACT_LIBRETRO_OUTPUT=./psxact-libretro/target/release/libpsxact_libretro.so. In the build stage add a build:linux:cli job that runs "apt update && apt -y install libsdl2-dev", then "cd psxact-cli", "cargo build --release", "cargo test --release", and stores $PSXACT_CLI_OUTPUT as an artifact for 1 week. Add a build:linux:lib job that runs "cd psxact", "cargo build --release", "cargo test --release". Add a build:linux:libretro job that runs "cd psxact-libretro", "cargo build --release", "cargo test --release", and stores $PSXACT_LIBRETRO_OUTPUT as an artifact for 1 week. In the package stage add a package:linux job that runs "mkdir out", "cp $PSXACT_CLI_OUTPUT $CI_PROJECT_DIR/out/.", "cp $PSXACT_LIBRETRO_OUTPUT $CI_PROJECT_DIR/out/.", publishes the out/* directory as an artifact for 1 week, and depends on the build:linux:cli and build:linux:libretro jobs.
